markets/awesome-ruby

9 days ago  11.6k
💎 A collection of awesome Ruby libraries, tools, frameworks and software
View byDAY/WEEK/README
View on Github

Apr 12th - Apr 18th, 2021

Authentication and OAuth

  • Devisestars21.6k - A flexible authentication solution for Rails based on Warden.

    • Data Visualization

  • Chartkick - Create beautiful Javascript charts with one line of Ruby.

    • Decorators

  • ShowForstars461 - Quickly show a model information with I18n features. Like form_for for displaying model data.

    • Email

  • MailFormstars823 - Send e-mail straight from forms in Rails with I18n, validations, attachments and request information.

    • Form Builder

  • Simple Formstars7.8k - Rails forms made easy.

    • Logging

  • Semantic Logger - Scalable, next generation enterprise logging for Ruby.

    • Search

  • has_scopestars1.5k - Has scope allows you to easily create controller filters based on your resources named scopes.

    • Services and Apps

  • Travis CI - Test and Deploy Your Code with Confidence.
  • Sider - Automated Code Review with GitHub PR. Monitoring Style Violations, Quality, Security, Dependencies.

    • Core Extensions

  • String
    • string_patternstars10 - Generate strings supplying a simple pattern.

    • CLI Builder

  • Runfilestars17 - Build command line applications per project with ease. Rake-inspired, Docopt inside.

    • Process Management and Monitoring

  • RedisWebManagerstars140 - Web interface that allows you to manage easily your Redis instance (see keys, memory used, connected client, etc...).

    • Markdown Processors

  • markdown_helperstars35 - A markdown pre-processor implementing file inclusion and page TOC (table of contents).

    • Cryptocurrencies and Blockchains

  • Ciristars102 - Ruby implementation of Ethereum.
  • MoneyTreestars171 - A Ruby implementation of Bitcoin HD Wallets (Hierarchical Deterministic) BIP32.

    • Mar 22nd - Mar 28th, 2021

    Automation

  • Runbookstars542 - A framework and Ruby DSL for progressive system automation.

    • Game Development and Graphics

  • Mittsustars409 - Mittsu makes 3D graphics easier by providing an abstraction over OpenGL, and is based heavily off of THREE.js.

    • Core Extensions

  • Trick Bagstars32 - Assorted Ruby classes and methods to simplify and enhance your code.

    • Machine Learning

  • TensorFlowstars266 - The end-to-end machine learning platform for Ruby.
  • Torch.rbstars347 - Deep learning for Ruby, powered by LibTorch.

    • Internationalization

  • mini_i18nstars91 - Minimalistic, flexible and fast Internationalization library. It supports localization, interpolations, pluralization, fallbacks, nested keys and more.

    • Mar 1st - Mar 7th, 2021

    Documentation

  • GitHub Changelog Generatorstars6.4k - Automatically generate change log from your tags, issues, labels and pull requests on GitHub.

    • Feb 22nd - Feb 28th, 2021

    Performance Monitoring

  • RoRvsWildstars168 - Performances and exceptions monitoring for Rails developers.

    • Feb 8th - Feb 14th, 2021

    GUI

  • Ruby-GNOMEstars323 - Ruby language bindings for the GNOME development environment.

    • Jan 18th - Jan 24th, 2021

    CRM

  • Hitobitostars216 - An open source Ruby on Rails based community management solution.

    • Jan 4th - Jan 10th, 2021

    API Builder and Discovery

  • jsonapi-serializerstars803 - A fast JSON:API serializer for Ruby Objects.

    • Scheduling

  • Simple Schedulerstars130 - An enhancement for Heroku Scheduler + Sidekiq for scheduling jobs at specific times with a readable YML file.

    • Nov 2nd - Nov 8th, 2020

    ORM/ODM Extensions

  • Bit array
    • ActiveFlagstars82 - Store up to 64 multiple flags in a single integer column with ActiveRecord.
    • Bitfieldsstars209 - Save migrations and columns by storing multiple booleans in a single integer.

    • Static Site Generation

  • Bridgetownstars340 - A Webpack-aware, Ruby-powered static site generator for the modern Jamstack era.

    • CMS

  • Storytimestars751 - Rails 4+ CMS and blogging engine, with a core focus on content.

    • Oct 12th - Oct 18th, 2020

    Rails Application Generators

  • railsnew.io - The simplest way to generate a new Rails app with (or without!) all the bells and whistles.

    • Machine Learning

  • rumalestars534 - A machine learning library with interfaces similar to Scikit-Learn.

    • Sep 28th - Oct 4th, 2020

    Social Networking

  • Threddedstars1.3k - Rails 4.2+ forums/messageboards engine. Its goal is to be as simple and feature rich as possible.

    • Sep 21st - Sep 27th, 2020

    Notifications

  • Noticedstars1.2k - ActionMailer-like Notification System for your Ruby on Rails app.
  • Ruby Push Notificationsstars386 - iOS, Android and Windows Phone Push notifications made easy.
  • Rpushstars1.8k - The push notification service for Ruby which supports Apple Push Notification Service, Google Cloud Messaging, Amazon Device Messaging and Windows Phone Push Notification Service.
  • webpushstars313 - Encryption Utilities for Web Push protocol.

    • Email

  • Truemail - Configurable framework agnostic plain Ruby email validator/verifier. Verify email via Regex, DNS and SMTP. Be sure that email address valid and exists.

    • Sep 7th - Sep 13th, 2020

    Debugging Tools

  • tapping_devicestars300 - A tool that allows you to inspect your program from an Object's perspective.

    • Aug 31st - Sep 6th, 2020

    Authorization

  • Consulstars275 - A scope-based authorization solution for Ruby on Rails.

    • API Builder and Discovery

  • Acts_As_Apistars506 - Easy And Fun, in creating XML/JSON responses in Rails 3,4,5 and 6.

    • Mobile Development

  • PubNubstars113 - Real-time Push Service in the Cloud.

    • Error Handling

  • Rollbarstars414 - Easy and powerful exception and error tracking for your applications.

    • Aug 24th - Aug 30th, 2020

    Image Processing

  • ImageProcessingstars620 - High-level image processing wrapper for libvips and ImageMagick/GraphicsMagick

    • Aug 17th - Aug 23rd, 2020

    GUI

  • Glimmerstars195 - Ruby DSL for SWT

    • Web Crawling

  • Kimuraistars764 - A modern web scraping framework written in Ruby which works out of box with Headless Chromium/Firefox, PhantomJS, or simple HTTP requests and allows to scrape and interact with JavaScript rendered websites.

    • API Builder and Discovery

  • Blueprinterstars665 - Simple, Fast, and Declarative Serialization Library for Ruby.

    • Jun 15th - Jun 21st, 2020

    Form Builder

  • ComfyBootstrapFormstars78 - Rails form builder that makes it easy to create forms with Bootstrap 4 markup

    • Git Tools

  • Git Lint - Analyzes Git commits for consistent quality.

    • Jun 1st - Jun 7th, 2020

    Web Servers

  • Falconstars1.9k - A high-performance web server for Ruby, supporting HTTP/1, HTTP/2 and TLS.

    • Web Frameworks

  • Pakyow - A framework for building modern web-apps in Ruby. It helps you build working software faster with a development process that remains friendly to both designers and developers.

    • May 11th - May 17th, 2020

    Scheduling

  • que-schedulerstars80 - A lightweight cron scheduler for the async job worker Que.

    • May 4th - May 10th, 2020

    CLI Utilities

  • Tabulostars204 - Plain text table generator with a DRY, column-based API.

    • WebSocket

  • CableReadystars503 - CableReady completes the ActionCable story and expands the utility of web sockets in your Rails app.
  • StimulusReflexstars1.8k - Build reactive applications with the Rails tooling you already know and love.

    • Date and Time Processing

  • holidaysstars625 - A collection of Ruby methods to deal with statutory and other holidays.

    • E-Commerce and Payments

  • credit_card_validationsstars174 - A ruby gem for validating credit card numbers, generating valid numbers, Luhn checks.

    • Security

  • Rack::Protection - Rack middleware for protecting against typical Web attacks.

    • Apr 27th - May 3rd, 2020

    Database Drivers

  • ruby-pgstars457 - Ruby interface to PostgreSQL 8.3 and later.

    • Robotics

  • Arlistars21 - Arli is the CLI tool for searching, installing, and packaging Arduino libraries with a project using a YAML-based Arlifile. It's a "Bundler for Arduino Development".

    • Web Servers

  • Thinstars2.1k - Tiny, fast & funny HTTP server.

    • Apr 20th - Apr 26th, 2020

    Captchas and anti-spam

  • ActsAsTextcaptchastars47 - Protection for Rails models with text-based logic question captchas (from Rob Tuley's textcaptcha.com)

    • Automation

  • ActiveWorkflowstars443 - An intelligent process and workflow automation platform based on software agents.

    • Optimizations

  • fast_underscorestars20 - Provides a C-optimized method for transforming a string from any capitalization into underscore-separated

    • Data Processing and ETL

  • ruby-stemmerstars254 - It Provides Snowball algorithm for stemming purposes.

    • Git Tools

  • git_curatestars384 - Peruse and delete git branches ergonomically.

    • Profiler and Optimization

  • stackprofstars1.8k - A sampling call-stack profiler for ruby 2.1+.
  • test-profstars1.3k - Ruby Tests Profiling Toolbox

    • Feb 17th - Feb 23rd, 2020

    Data Processing and ETL

  • CSV Readerstars169 - A modern tabular data (line-by-line records) reader supports "classic" CSV but also CSV Numerics, CSV <3 JSON, CSV <3 YAML, tab, space or fixed width fields (FWF) and many more flavors and dialects.

    • E-Commerce and Payments

  • Workareastars296 - An extensible, high-performance eCommerce platform depended on by some of the world's top retailers.

    • Game Development and Graphics

  • Ruby 2Dstars432 - Create cross-platform 2D applications, games, and visualizations with ease.

    • Feb 3rd - Feb 9th, 2020

    Documentation

  • Documentationstars215 - A Rails engine to provide the ability to add documentation to a Rails application.

    • Jan 27th - Feb 2nd, 2020

  • working_hoursstars437 - A modern ruby gem allowing to do time calculation with working hours.

  • Rapidfirestars293 - Making dynamic surveys should be easy!

    Authorization

  • ActionPolicystars749 - Authorization framework for Ruby and Rails applications. Composable, extensible and performant.

    • Web Crawling

  • Spidrstars661 - A versatile Ruby web spidering library that can spider a site, multiple domains, certain links or infinitely. Spidr is designed to be fast and easy to use.

    • Oct 28th - Nov 3rd, 2019

    HTML/XML Parsing

  • Oga - An XML/HTML parser written in Ruby. Oga does not require system libraries such as libxml, making it easier and faster to install on various platforms.

  • Sentimentalstars440 - Simple sentiment analysis with Ruby.

  • Zeitwerkstars1.3k - An efficient and thread-safe Ruby code loader.

    • Jul 22nd - Jul 28th, 2019

  • ApexCharts.rbstars358 - Awesome charts for your ruby app. Works on any ruby app, including Rails app. It even works on plain HTML+ERB files.

  • Refinery CMS - An open source Ruby on Rails content management system for Rails 5.2+.

    • Code Formatting

  • prettierstars1.1k - A prettier plugin for the Ruby language.

    • Rubocop Performancestars364 - A RuboCop extension focused on code performance checks.

  • humidifierstars48 - Programmatically generate and manage AWS CloudFormation templates, stacks, and change sets.

  • Sonic Pistars7.9k - A live coding synth for everyone originally designed to support computing and music lessons.
  • Maestrostars114 - A Slack-Powered music bot for Spotify

  • Uru - Uru is a lightweight, multi-platform command line tool that helps you use the multiple rubies on your 32/64-bit Linux, OS X, or Windows systems.

    • Apr 1st - Apr 7th, 2019

    Debugging Tools

  • pry-railsstars1.3k - Avoid repeating yourself, use pry-rails instead of copying the initializer to every rails project. This is a small gem which causes rails console to open pry. It therefore depends on pry.

    Date and Time Processing

  • timezonestars304 - Accurate current and historical timezones and transformations, with support for Geonames and Google latitude - longitude timezone lookups.

  • Whirlystars296 - A simple, colorful and customizable terminal spinner library for Ruby.

  • Sidekiq-Cronstars1.4k - A scheduling add-on for Sidekiq.

    • HTML/XML Parsing

  • Nokogiri - An HTML, XML, SAX, and Reader parser with XPath and CSS selector support.

    • Queues and Messaging

  • Sidekiq - A full-featured background processing framework for Ruby. It aims to be simple to integrate with any modern Rails application and much higher performance than other existing solutions.

    • Social Networking

  • Mastodonstars2 - A GNU Social-compatible microblogging server.

    • Static Site Generation

  • Jekyll - Transform your plain text into static websites and blogs.
    • Awesome Jekyllstars547 - A collection of awesome Jekyll tools, plugins, themes, guides and much more.

    • Services and Apps

  • Inch CI - Documentation badges for Ruby projects.
  • SemaphoreCI - Hosted continuous integration and deployment service for open source and private projects.

    • Resources

  • Ruby Rogues - Weekly panel discussion about programming, primarily in Ruby.
  • Ruby Weekly - A free, once–weekly e-mail round-up of Ruby news and articles.
  • The Ruby Toolbox - A comprehensive catalog of Ruby and Rails plug-ins, gems, tools and resources for Ruby developers with popularity ratings based on GitHub watchers and Gem downloads.

    • Feb 11th - Feb 17th, 2019

    Resources

  • The Ruby Bibliography - Research papers about Ruby.

    • Jan 28th - Feb 3rd, 2019

    HTTP Clients and tools

  • HTTPX - acknowledges the ease-of-use of the httpstars2.7k gem API (itself inspired by python requests library) which aims at reusing the same facade, extending it for the use cases which the http gem doesn't support.

    • CLI Builder

  • cmdparse - An advanced command line parser supporting nested commands.

    • Database Tools

  • SecondBasestars216 - Seamless second database integration for Rails. SecondBase provides support for Rails to manage dual databases by extending ActiveRecord tasks that create, migrate, and test your application.
  • Standbystars81 - Read from standby databases for ActiveRecord (formerly Slavery).

    • Dec 17th - Dec 23rd, 2018

    Country Data

  • validates_zipcodestars102 - Postal code / zipcode validation for Rails, supporting 233 country codes.

    • Dec 10th - Dec 16th, 2018

    Web Frameworks

  • Hyperstack - A Complete Isomorphic Ruby Framework using React and Opal.

    • Nov 12th - Nov 18th, 2018

  • Smashing - Smashing is a Sinatra based framework that lets you build beautiful dashboards. This project is the maintained spiritual successor to the Dashing framework.

  • Dropboxstars143 - Ruby client for Dropbox API v2.

    • Oct 29th - Nov 4th, 2018

    CLI Builder

  • Hanami CLIstars5 - General purpose Command Line Interface (CLI) framework for Ruby.

    • Oct 22nd - Oct 28th, 2018

    Email

  • MidiSmtpServer - The highly customizable ruby SMTP-Service library with builtin support for AUTH and SSL/STARTTLS, 8BITMIME and SMTPUTF8, IPv4 and IPv6 and more.

  • Blazerstars2.9k - Simple data viewer using only SQL. Output to table, chart, and maps.

  • Measuredstars179 - Wrapper objects which encapsulate measurements and their associated units in Ruby.
  • Ruby Unitsstars391 - Provides classes and methods to perform unit math and conversions.

  • bcrypt-rubystars1.7k - bcrypt-ruby is a Ruby binding for the OpenBSD bcrypt() password hashing algorithm.

  • fukuzatsu - Complexity analysis tool with a rich web front-end.

  • colorizestars1.1k - Extends String class or add a ColorizedString with methods to set text color, background color and text effects.

  • bootsnapstars2.4k - Boot large Ruby/Rails apps faster.
  • fast_blankstars587 - Provides a C-optimized method for determining if a string is blank.

  • Itamaestars1k - Simple and lightweight configuration management tool inspired by Chef.

  • rails-i18nstars3.7k - Repository for collecting Locale data for Rails I18n as well as other interesting, Rails related I18n stuff.

  • Postalstars10.4k - A fully featured open source mail delivery platform for incoming & outgoing e-mail.

    • Logging

  • Sysloggerstars109 - A drop-in replacement for the standard Logger Ruby library, that logs to the syslog instead of a log file.

    • Admin Interface

  • ActiveScaffoldstars1k - ActiveScaffold provides quick and powerful user interfaces for CRUD (create, read, update, delete) operations for Rails applications. It's excellent for generating admin interfaces, managing Data-Heavy Applications, creating Widgets or for quick prototyping. ActiveScaffold is completly customizable and offers a bunch of additional features including searching, pagination, layout control and overrides of fields, forms and templates.

  • Clearancestars3.4k - Small and simple email & password based authentication for Rails.

    • acts_as_archivalstars91 - ActiveRecord plugin for atomic object tree archiving.

    • Auditedstars2.9k - Audited is an ORM extension for ActiveRecord & MongoMapper that logs all changes to your models.
    • Destroyed Atstars352 - Allows you to "destroy" an object without deleting the record or associated records.
    • Discardstars1.4k - A simple ActiveRecord mixin to add conventions for flagging records as discarded.
    • Logidzestars1.1k - Database changes log for Rails.
    • marginaliastars1.4k - Attach comments to your ActiveRecord queries. By default, it adds the application, controller, and action names as a comment at the end of each query.
    • mongoid-historystars376 - Multi-user non-linear history tracking, auditing, undo, redo for mongoid.
    • PaperTrailstars6.1k - Track changes to your ActiveRecord models' data for auditing or versioning.
    • Paranoiastars2.6k - A re-implementation of acts_as_paranoid for Rails 3 and 4, using much, much, much less code.

    • ActsAsListstars1.7k - Provides the capabilities for sorting and reordering a number of objects in a list.
    • ranked-modelstars938 - A modern row sorting library for ActiveRecord. It uses ARel aggressively and is better optimized than most other libraries.
  • Social
    • Meritstars1.4k - Adds reputation behavior to Rails apps in the form of Badges, Points, and Rankings for ActiveRecord or Mongoid.
    • PublicActivitystars2.8k - Provides easy activity tracking for your ActiveRecord, Mongoid 3 and MongoMapper models in Rails 3 and 4. Similar to Github's Public Activity.
    • Simple Feedstars293 - Fast and highly scalable read-optimized social activity feed library in pure Ruby, backed by Redis.
    • Unreadstars648 - Manage read/unread status of ActiveRecord objects - and it's fast.
  • Tree
    • ActsAsTreestars540 - Extends ActiveRecord to add simple support for organizing items into parent–children relationships.
    • Ancestrystars3.3k - Organise ActiveRecord model into a tree structure using a variation on the materialised path pattern.
    • Awesome Nested Setstars2.2k - Awesome Nested Set is an implementation of the nested set pattern for ActiveRecord models.
    • Closure Treestars1.6k - Easily and efficiently make your ActiveRecord models support hierarchies using a Closure Table.
    • Mongoid Treestars308 - A tree structure for Mongoid documents using the materialized path pattern.

    • Date and Time Processing

  • business_timestars991 - Support for doing time math in business hours and days.
  • Chronicstars3.1k - A natural language date/time parser written in pure Ruby.
  • groupdatestars3.2k - The simplest way to group temporal data in ActiveRecord, arrays and hashes.
  • time_diffstars139 - Calculates the difference between two time.
  • TZinfostars302 - Provides daylight savings aware transformations between times in different timezones.
  • validates_timelinessstars1.4k - Date and time validation plugin for ActiveModel and Rails.

    • Decorators

  • Draperstars5k - Draper adds an object-oriented layer of presentation logic to your Rails application.

    • DevOps Tools

  • Capistrano - A remote server automation and deployment tool written in Ruby.
  • Puppetstars6.2k - An automated administrative engine for your Linux, Unix, and Windows systems, performs administrative tasks (such as adding users, installing packages, and updating server configurations) based on a centralized specification.
  • Vagrant - Create and configure lightweight, reproducible, and portable development environments.

    • Documentation

  • Inchstars508 - Inch is a documentation measurement and evalutation tool for Ruby code, based on YARD.
  • YARD - YARD enables the user to generate consistent, usable documentation that can be exported to a number of formats very easily.

    • E-Commerce and Payments

  • Paypal Merchant SDKstars107 - Official Paypal Merchant SDK for Ruby.
  • Piggybakstars273 - Modular, Extensible open-source ecommerce solution for Ruby on Rails.
  • ROR Ecommercestars1.2k - A Rails e-commerce platform.
  • Spreestars11.2k - Spree is a complete open source e-commerce solution for Ruby on Rails.
  • stripe-rubystars1.6k - Stripe Ruby bindings.

    • Ebook

  • Gepubstars179 - A generic EPUB library for Ruby : supports EPUB 3.
  • Mobistars36 - A Ruby way to read MOBI format metadata.
  • Reviewstars1.2k - Re:VIEW is flexible document format/conversion system.

    • Email

  • Incomingstars302 - Incoming! helps you receive email in your Rack apps.
  • Mailstars3.3k - A Really Ruby Mail Library.
  • Ponystars1.1k - The express way to send mail from Ruby.

    • Environment Management

  • chrubystars2.4k - Change your current Ruby. No shims, no crazy options or features, ~90 LOC.
  • frystars62 - Simple ruby version manager for fish.
  • gem_homestars118 - A tool for changing your $GEM_HOME.
  • rbenvstars13.3k - Use rbenv to pick a Ruby version for your application and guarantee that your development environment matches production.
  • ruby-buildstars3.5k - Compile and install Ruby.
  • ruby-installstars1.6k - Installs Ruby, JRuby, Rubinius, MagLev or MRuby.
  • RVM - RVM is a command-line tool which allows you to easily install, manage, and work with multiple ruby environments from interpreters to sets of gems.

    • Error Handling

  • Airbrakestars897 - The official Airbrake library for Ruby on Rails (and other Rack based frameworks).
  • Better Errorsstars6.7k - Better error page for Rack apps.
  • Exception Notificationstars2.1k - A set of notifiers for sending notifications when errors occur in a Rack/Rails application.
  • Nestystars116 - Nested exceptions for Ruby.

    • File Upload

  • CarrierWavestars8.6k - Classier solution for file uploads for Rails, Sinatra and other Ruby web frameworks.
  • DragonFlystars2.1k - A Ruby gem for on-the-fly processing - suitable for image uploading in Rails, Sinatra and much more!.
  • rack-secure-uploadstars75 - Upload files securely.

    • Form Builder

  • Formtasticstars5.1k - A Rails form builder plugin with semantically rich and accessible markup.
  • Rails Bootstrap Formsstars1.5k - Rails form builder that makes it super easy to create beautiful-looking forms with Twitter Bootstrap 3+.

    • Game Development and Graphics

  • Gosu - A 2D game development library for the Ruby and C++ programming languages.

    • Geolocation

  • Geocoderstars5.9k - A complete geocoding solution for Ruby. With Rails it adds geocoding (by street or IP address), reverse geocoding (find street address based on given coordinates), and distance queries.
  • Geokitstars1.6k - Geokit gem provides geocoding and distance/heading calculations.

    • Git Tools

  • git-auto-bisectstars85 - Find the commit that broke master.
  • git-spelunkstars44 - Dig through git blame history.
  • git-whencestars22 - Find which merge a commit came from.
  • Ruggedstars2.1k - Ruby bindings to libgit2.

    • GUI

  • qtbindingsstars335 - Allows the QT Gui toolkit to be used from Ruby.
  • Shoes - Shoes makes building little graphical programs for Mac, Windows, and Linux super simple.

    • HTML/XML Parsing

  • HappyMapperstars138 - Object to XML mapping library, using Nokogiri.

    • HTTP Clients and tools

  • Faradaystars5k - an HTTP client lib that provides a common interface over many adapters (such as Net::HTTP) and embraces the concept of Rack middleware when processing the request/response cycle.
  • Http Clientstars676 - Gives something like the functionality of libwww-perl (LWP) in Ruby.
  • httpartystars5.4k - Makes http fun again!
  • RESTClientstars5k - Simple HTTP and REST client for Ruby, inspired by microframework syntax for specifying actions.
  • Sawyerstars223 - Secret user agent of HTTP, built on top of Faraday.
  • Typhoeusstars3.8k - Typhoeus wraps libcurl in order to make fast and reliable requests.

    • Image Processing

  • MiniMagickstars2.7k - A ruby wrapper for ImageMagick or GraphicsMagick command line.
  • PSD.rbstars3.1k - Parse Photoshop files in Ruby with ease.
  • RMagickstars584 - RMagick is an interface between Ruby and ImageMagick.

    • Internationalization

  • i18n-tasksstars1.7k - Manage missing and unused translations with the awesome power of static analysis.
  • i18nstars876 - Ruby Internationalization and localization solution.
  • twitter-cldr-rbstars624 - Ruby implementation of the ICU (International Components for Unicode) that uses the Common Locale Data Repository to format dates, plurals, and more.

    • Logging

  • Fluentdstars10.2k - Fluentd collects events from various data sources and writes them to files, database or other types of storages.
  • Log4rstars241 - Log4r is a comprehensive and flexible logging library for use in Ruby programs.
  • MongoDB Loggerstars141 - MongoDB logger for Rails.
  • Scrollsstars156 - Simple logging.
  • Yellstars316 - Your Extensible Logging Library.

    • Machine Learning

  • PredictionIO Ruby SDKstars192 - The PredictionIO Ruby SDK provides a convenient API to quickly record your users' behavior and retrieve personalized predictions for them.

    • Markdown Processors

  • kramdownstars1.5k - Kramdown is yet-another-markdown-parser but fast, pure Ruby, using a strict syntax definition and supporting several common extensions.
  • Marukustars491 - A pure-Ruby Markdown-superset interpreter.
  • Redcarpetstars4.6k - A fast, safe and extensible Markdown to (X)HTML parser.

    • Money

  • eu_central_bankstars178 - A gem that calculates the exchange rate using published rates from European Central Bank.
  • Moneystars2.4k - A Ruby Library for dealing with money and currency conversion.

    • Natural Language Processing

  • Treatstars1.3k - Treat is a toolkit for natural language processing and computational linguistics in Ruby.

    • ORM/ODM

  • Sequelstars4.4k - Sequel is a simple, flexible, and powerful SQL database access toolkit for Ruby.

    • Pagination

  • Kaminaristars10 - A Scope & Engine based, clean, powerful, customizable and sophisticated paginator for modern web app frameworks and ORMs.
  • will_paginatestars5.6k - A pagination library that integrates with Ruby on Rails, Sinatra, Merb, DataMapper and Sequel.

    • PDF

  • Pdfkitstars2.8k - HTML+CSS to PDF using wkhtmltopdf.
  • Prawnstars4.2k - Fast, Nimble PDF Writer for Ruby.
  • Wicked Pdfstars3.2k - PDF generator (from HTML) plugin for Ruby on Rails.

    • Performance Monitoring

  • New Relicstars1.1k - Find and fix Ruby errors with New Relic application monitoring and troubleshooting.

    • Process Management and Monitoring

  • Bluepillstars419 - Simple process monitoring tool.
  • Godstars2.2k - An easy to configure, easy to extend monitoring framework written in Ruby.

    • Processes

  • posix-spawnstars509 - Fast Process::spawn for Rubys >= 1.8.7 based on the posix_spawn() system interfaces.

    • Profiler and Optimization

  • bulletstars6.2k - Help to kill N+1 queries and unused eager loading.
  • Peekstars3.1k - Visual status bar showing Rails performance.
  • rack-mini-profilerstars3.3k - Profiler for your development and production Ruby rack apps.
  • ruby-profstars1.9k - A code profiler for MRI rubies.

    • Queues and Messaging

  • Delayed::Jobstars4.6k - Database backed asynchronous priority queue.
  • Resquestars8.9k - A Redis-backed Ruby library for creating background jobs.

    • Scheduling

  • resque-schedulerstars1.7k - A light-weight job scheduling system built on top of Resque.
  • rufus-schedulerstars2.2k - Job scheduler for Ruby (at, cron, in and every jobs).
  • Wheneverstars8.4k - A Ruby gem that provides a clear syntax for writing and deploying cron jobs.

    • Search

  • pg_searchstars648 - Builds ActiveRecord named scopes that take advantage of PostgreSQL's full text search.
  • Rroongastars63 - The Ruby bindings of Groonga.
  • Sunspotstars2.9k - A Ruby library for expressive, powerful interaction with the Solr search engine.
  • Thinking Sphinxstars1.6k - A library for connecting ActiveRecord to the Sphinx full-text search tool.

    • SEO

  • FriendlyIdstars5.6k - The "Swiss Army bulldozer" of slugging and permalink plugins for Active Record.
  • MetaTagsstars2.4k - A gem to make your Rails application SEO-friendly.
  • SitemapGeneratorstars2.3k - A framework-agnostic XML Sitemap generator written in Ruby.

    • Social Networking

  • diaspora*stars12.7k - A privacy aware, distributed, open source social network.
  • Discoursestars33.3k - A platform for community discussion. Free, open, simple.
  • Social Sharesstars327 - A gem to check how many times url was shared in social networks.

    • State Machines

  • AASMstars4.3k - State machines for Ruby classes (plain Ruby, Rails Active Record, Mongoid).
  • simple_statesstars94 - A super-slim statemachine-like support library.
  • Statesmanstars1.3k - A statesmanlike state machine library.
  • Workflowstars1.6k - A finite-state-machine-inspired API for modeling and interacting with what we tend to refer to as 'workflow'.

    • Static Site Generation

  • High Voltagestars3.1k - Easily include static pages in your Rails app.
  • Middleman - A static site generator using all the shortcuts and tools in modern web development.
  • Nanoc - A static site generator, fit for building anything from a small personal blog to a large corporate web site.

    • Template Engine

  • Curlystars587 - A template language that completely separates structure and logic.
  • Hamlstars3.6k - HTML Abstraction Markup Language.
  • Liquidstars8.7k - Safe, customer facing template language for flexible web apps.
  • Mustachestars2.8k - Logic-less Ruby templates.
  • Slimstars5k - A template language whose goal is reduce the syntax to the essential parts without becoming cryptic.
  • Tiltstars1.8k - Generic interface to multiple Ruby template engines.

    • Third-party APIs

  • flickrstars19 - A Ruby interface to the Flickr API.
  • gitlabstars948 - Ruby wrapper and CLI for the GitLab API.
  • hipchat-rbstars345 - HipChat HTTP API Wrapper in Ruby with Capistrano hooks.
  • instagram-ruby-gemstars1.5k - The official gem for the Instagram REST and Search APIs.
  • itunes_store_transporterstars117 - Ruby wrapper around Apple's iTMSTransporter program.
  • linkedinstars754 - Provides an easy-to-use wrapper for LinkedIn's REST APIs.
  • Octokit - Ruby toolkit for the GitHub API.
  • ruby-gmailstars788 - A Rubyesque interface to Gmail.
  • ruby-trellostars688 - Implementation of the Trello API for Ruby.
  • soundcloud-rubystars1 - Official SoundCloud API Wrapper for Ruby.
  • tstars5.3k - A command-line power tool for Twitter.
  • tweetstreamstars1.1k - A simple library for consuming Twitter's Streaming API.
  • twitterstars4.4k - A Ruby interface to the Twitter API.
  • Ytstars680 - An object-oriented Ruby client for YouTube API V3.

    • Web Crawling

  • MetaInspectorstars921 - Ruby gem for web scraping purposes.
  • Uptonstars1.6k - A batteries-included framework for easy web-scraping.
  • Wombatstars1.2k - Web scraper with an elegant DSL that parses structured data from web pages.

    • Web Frameworks

  • Cuba - A microframework for web development.
  • Padrino - A full-stack ruby framework built upon Sinatra.
  • Ramaze - A simple, light and modular open-source web application framework written in Ruby.
  • Roda - A routing tree web framework.
  • Ruby on Rails - A web-application framework that includes everything needed to create database-backed web applications according to the Model-View-Controller (MVC) pattern.
  • Sinatra - Classy web-development dressed in a DSL.

    • Web Servers

  • Phusion Passenger - Fast and robust web server and application server.
  • Pumastars6.7k - A modern, concurrent web server for Ruby.
  • Rack - A common Ruby web server interface. By itself, it's just a specification and utility library, but all Ruby web servers implement this interface.
  • Unicorn - Rack HTTP server for fast clients and Unix.

    • WebSocket

  • Faye - A set of tools for simple publish-subscribe messaging between web clients.

    • Resources

  • GitHub Trending - Find what repositories the GitHub community is most excited about today.
  • RubyDaily - Community driven news.
  • RubyFlow - Ruby Programming Community Link Blog.

    • Oct 13th - Oct 19th, 2014

    Performance Monitoring

  • Skylightstars247 - A smart profiler for your Rails apps that visualizes request performance.

    • Authorization

  • CanCanCanstars4.9k - Continuation of CanCan, an authorization Gem for Ruby on Rails.

    • Sep 29th - Oct 5th, 2014

    Pagination

  • order_querystars478 - A keyset pagination library to find the next or previous record(s) relative to the current one efficiently, e.g. for infinite scroll.

    • Sep 8th - Sep 14th, 2014

    Concurrency and Parallelism

  • Concurrent Rubystars5.1k - Modern concurrency tools including agents, futures, promises, thread pools, supervisors, and more. Inspired by Erlang, Clojure, Scala, Go, Java, JavaScript, and classic concurrency patterns.

    Queues and Messaging

  • Sucker Punchstars2.5k - A single process background processing library using Celluloid. Aimed to be Sidekiq's little brother.

    API Builder and Discovery

  • JSONAPI::Resourcesstars2.2k - JSONAPI::Resources, or "JR", provides a framework for developing a server that complies with the JSON API specification.

    • Assets

  • Less Railsstars342 - The dynamic stylesheet language for the Rails asset pipeline.

    • Authentication and OAuth

  • OAuth:
    • Doorkeeperstars4.8k - An OAuth2 provider for Rails.
    • OAuth2stars2k - A Ruby wrapper for the OAuth 2.0 protocol.

    • Code Analysis and Metrics

  • Brakemanstars6.1k - A static analysis security vulnerability scanner for Ruby on Rails applications.
  • Flaystars626 - Flay analyzes code for structural similarities. Differences in literal values, variable, class, method names, whitespace, programming style, braces vs do/end, etc are all ignored. Making this totally rad.
  • Flogstars735 - Flog reports the most tortured code in an easy to read pain report. The higher the score, the more pain the code is in.
  • Rubycriticstars2.7k - A Ruby code quality reporter.
  • SimpleCovstars4.2k - Code coverage for Ruby 1.9+ with a powerful configuration library and automatic merging of coverage across test suites.

    • Core Extensions

  • ActiveSupport - A collection of utility classes and standard library extensions.
  • Ruby Facetsstars752 - The premiere collection of general purpose method extensions and standard additions for Ruby.
  • Attributes
    • ActiveAttrstars1.2k - What ActiveModel left out.
    • FastAttributesstars275 - FastAttributes adds attributes with their types to the class.
    • Virtusstars3.8k - Attributes on Steroids for Plain Old Ruby Objects.
    • AttrExtrasstars494 - Takes some boilerplate out of Ruby with methods like attr_initialize.
  • Hash
    • Hashiestars2.7k - A collection of tools that extend Hashes and make them more useful.

    • Dashboards

  • Dashing-Railsstars1.5k - The exceptionally handsome dashboard framework for Rails.

    • Data Visualization

  • RailRoadystars1.7k - Ruby on Rails 3/4 model and controller UML class diagram generator.
  • Rails Erdstars3.5k - Generate Entity-Relationship Diagrams for Rails applications.

    • Debugging Tools

  • Byebugstars3.1k - A simple to use, feature rich debugger for Ruby 2.

    • DevOps Tools

  • Lita - ChatOps for Ruby: A pluggable chat bot framework usable with any chat service.
  • Minastars4.2k - Really fast deployer and server automation tool.
  • Rubberstars1.5k - The rubber plugin enables relatively complex multi-instance deployments of RubyOnRails applications to Amazon's Elastic Compute Cloud (EC2).

    • Email

  • LetterOpenerstars3.3k - Preview mail in the browser instead of sending.

    • Error Handling

  • Raven Rubystars743 - Raven is a Ruby client for Sentry.

    • HTML/XML Parsing

  • ROXMLstars215 - Custom mapping and bidirectional marshalling between Ruby and XML using annotation-style class methods, via Nokogiri or LibXML.

    • HTTP Clients and tools

  • exconstars1.1k - Usable, fast, simple Ruby HTTP 1.1. It works great as a general HTTP(s) client and is particularly well suited to usage in API clients.
  • Patronstars537 - Patron is a Ruby HTTP client library based on libcurl.
  • Savonstars2k - Savon is a SOAP client for the Ruby programming language.

    • Internationalization

  • r18nstars508 - Advanced i18n library for Rails, Sinatra, desktop apps, models, works well with complex languages like Russian.

    • Logging

  • HttpLogstars639 - Log outgoing HTTP requests.
  • Loggingstars497 - A flexible logging library for use in Ruby programs based on the design of Java's log4j library.
  • Logragestars3k - An attempt to tame Rails' default policy to log everything.

    • Package Management

  • Gems
    • Bundler - Manage your application's gem dependencies with less pain.
    • RubyGems - Community's gem hosting service.
    • Cloudsmith - A fully managed package management SaaS with support for Rubygems (and many others).
  • Packages and Applications
    • Berkshelfstars1.1k - A Chef Cookbook manager.
    • CocoaPodsstars13.2k - The Objective-C dependency manager.
    • fpmstars9.9k - Effing package management! Build packages for multiple platforms (deb, rpm, etc) with great ease and sanity.
    • Linuxbrewstars1k - A fork of Homebrew for Linux.
    • Homebrew-caskstars18.2k - A CLI workflow for the administration of Mac applications distributed as binaries.
    • Homebrewstars27.9k - The missing package manager for OS X.
    • Traveling Ruby - Traveling Ruby lets you create self-contained Ruby app packages for Linux and OS X.

    • PDF

  • Kitabustars632 - A framework for creating e-books from Markdown/Textile text markup using Ruby.
  • RGhoststars179 - RGhost is a document creation and conversion API.

    • Processes

  • childprocessstars511 - Cross-platform ruby library for managing child processes.

    • Robotics

  • Artoo - Next generation robotics framework with support for different platforms: Arduino, Leap Motion, Pebble, Raspberry Pi, etc.

    • RSS

  • Feed normalizerstars135 - Extensible Ruby wrapper for Atom and RSS parsers.
  • Feedjirastars2k - A feed fetching and parsing library.
  • Simple rssstars222 - A simple, flexible, extensible, and liberal RSS and Atom reader.

    • Search

  • ransackstars4.8k - Object-based searching.
  • Searchkickstars5.6k - Searchkick learns what your users are looking for. As more people search, it gets smarter and the results get better. It’s friendly for developers - and magical for your users.

    • Testing

  • Frameworks
    • RSpecstars2.8k - Behaviour Driven Development for Ruby.
      • Formatters
        • Emoji-RSpecstars173 - Custom Emoji Formatters for RSpec.
        • Fuubarstars856 - The instafailing RSpec progress bar formatter.
        • Nyan Catstars728 - Nyan Cat inspired RSpec formatter!
    • Arubastars903 - Testing command line applications with cucumber and rspec.
    • Baconstars421 - A small RSpec clone.
    • Capybarastars9.4k - Acceptance test framework for web applications.
    • Cucumberstars3.2k - BDD that talks to domain experts first and code second.
    • Cuteststars149 - Isolated tests in Ruby.
    • Fixstars42 - Specing framework for Ruby.
    • Howitzerstars179 - Ruby based framework for acceptance testing
    • miniteststars2.9k - minitest provides a complete suite of testing facilities supporting TDD, BDD, mocking, and benchmarking.
    • Mochastars1.1k - Mocha is a mocking and stubbing library for Ruby.
    • RRstars279 - A test double framework that features a rich selection of double techniques and a terse syntax.
    • shoulda-matchersstars3k - Provides Test::Unit- and RSpec-compatible one-liners that test common Rails functionality. These tests would otherwise be much longer, more complex, and error-prone.
    • Spinachstars562 - Spinach is a high-level BDD framework that leverages the expressive Gherkin language (used by Cucumber) to help you define executable specifications of your application or library's acceptance criteria.
    • Test::Unit - Test::Unit is a xUnit family unit testing framework for Ruby.
  • Fake Data
    • Fabrication - A simple and powerful object generation library.
    • factory_botstars7.2k - A library for setting up Ruby objects as test data.
    • Fake Personstars116 - Uses some of the most popular given & surnames in the US & UK.
    • fakerstars9.3k - A library for generating fake data such as names, addresses, and phone numbers.
    • ffakerstars1.4k - A faster Faker, generates dummy data, rewrite of faker.
    • Forgerystars784 - Easy and customizable generation of forged data.
  • Mock
    • ActiveMockerstars497 - Generate mocks from ActiveRecord models for unit tests that run fast because they don’t need to load Rails or a database.
    • DnsMockstars29 - Ruby DNS mock. Mimic any DNS records for your test environment and even more.
    • DuckRailsstars1.7k - Tool for mocking API endpoints quickly & dynamically.
    • TestXmlstars30 - TestXml is a small extension for testing XML/HTML.
    • WebMockstars3.5k - Library for stubbing and setting expectations on HTTP requests.
  • WebDrivers
    • Selenium WebDriver - Ruby bindings for WebDriver.
    • API Tasterstars736 - A quick and easy way to visually test your Rails application's API.
    • Poltergeiststars2.5k - A PhantomJS driver for Capybara.
    • Watirstars1.4k - Web application testing in Ruby.
  • Extra
    • Appraisalstars1.1k - Appraisal integrates with bundler and rake to test your library against different versions of dependencies.
    • CQLstars19 - CQL is a library for making queries against Cucumber style test suites.
    • cuke_modelerstars14 - An modeling library for .feature files that is an abstration layer on top of the gherkin gem, providing a stable base upon which to build other Gherkin related tools.
    • gitarrostars11 - Run, retrigger, handle all type and OS-independent tests against your GitHub Pull Requests.
    • Knapsackstars435 - Optimal test suite parallelisation across CI nodes for RSpec, Cucumber, Minitest, Spinach and Turnip.
    • mutantstars1.7k - Mutant is a mutation testing tool for Ruby.
    • Parallel Testsstars3k - Speedup Test::Unit + RSpec + Cucumber by running parallel on multiple CPUs (or cores).
    • power_assertstars1 - Power Assert for Ruby.
    • Ruby-JMeterstars733 - A Ruby based DSL for building JMeter test plans.
    • Springstars2.7k - Preloads your rails environment in the background for faster testing and Rake tasks.
    • timecopstars3.1k - Provides "time travel" and "time freezing" capabilities, making it dead simple to test time-dependent code.
    • vcrstars5.1k - Record your test suite's HTTP interactions and replay them during future test runs for fast, deterministic, accurate tests.
    • Wraithstars4.7k - A responsive screenshot comparison tool.
    • Zapatastars413 - Who has time to write tests? This is a revolutionary tool to make them write themselves.

  • wikipediastars257 - Ruby client for the Wikipedia API.
